message:
fix: resolve mission control state and parsing bugs (#5505, #5504, #5503, #5502) (#5513)

- JSON extraction: replace greedy regex with balanced-brace scanner that
  correctly handles prose with multiple {} blocks (#5505)
- New Mission: reset stepper highestReached state so only Phase 1 is
  reachable after reset (#5504)
- Assignment dedup: guard against duplicate projectNames when toggling
  the same project onto a cluster multiple times (#5503)
- AI assign for manual workflows: start a planning mission when none
  exists so the button is not silently a no-op (#5502)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
